settings.subheading: Pick the reason that matches your need, then send one support request with the right context.

settings.heading: Three clear request types
settings.copy: Pick the reason that matches your need, then send one support request with the right context.

settings.title: Product help
settings.copy: Use this for setup questions, compatibility uncertainty, troubleshooting, or product-specific guidance.

settings.title: Order help
settings.copy: Use this for shipping questions, returns, order references, and post-purchase order support.

settings.title: Warranty help
settings.copy: Use this for coverage questions, claim context, and warranty-related support.

settings.heading: Tell us what you need
settings.copy: Choose the request type, add the key details, and keep the message focused on the next step you need.
settings.side_copy: Include the product name, order reference when relevant, and a short summary of what you expected versus what happened.
settings.success_message: Thanks for reaching out. Your message has been sent.
